THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR, MARIA ROMERO, FRANCISCO BARAHONA, CECILIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1292 TREAT ST, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFTS SHALL NOT VACATE PREMISES. DEFTS PAY AS FOLLOWS ON OR BEFORE 5PM - $1245- 6/13/97, $415- 7/1/97 & $415- 8/1/97. FROM 9/1/97 DEFT TO PAY $615- PER MONTH, IF PAID AFTER THE 4TH PLTF TO EVICT DEFTS. PLTF TO MAKE WINDOW REPAIRS. DEFTS TO PAY $1000- SECURITY DEPOSIT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
